prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of an overstuffed but real-life women's wardrobe: lots of clothes crammed onto a single rail so it looks cluttered and a little chaotic, a few items slipping off hangers. Lived-in muted everyday palette dominated by creams, oat, dusty rose, soft blue and muted sage, with only small occasional accents of red or print. Absolutely no large flat blocks or sheets of bright saturated red. A small modest pile of just a few fallen garments on the floor below, not a big heap. Soft natural daylight, realistic slightly-desaturated true colour, the quiet overwhelm of too many clothes and nothing to wear. Candid documentary photography, fine fabric texture, no text, no logos, no faces.
